title: BuildConfigSpec
description: Specification of the desired BuildConfig behavior.

triggers.description: Triggers that cause new builds to be created.

runPolicy.description: Controls how builds from this config run concurrently.

serviceAccount.description: The ServiceAccount to run the build pod as.

completionDeadlineSeconds.description: Optional duration in seconds builds may be active before being terminated.

successfulBuildsHistoryLimit.description: Number of successful builds to retain.

failedBuildsHistoryLimit.description: Number of failed builds to retain.
